place: Porsche Design Tower, Sukhumvit, Khlong Toei, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Porsche Design Tower — Quadruplex Sky Mansion
blurb: One of only two quadruplex sky mansions crowning the Porsche Design Tower — four private levels in the sky above central Bangkok, with a heated sky pool, private car lift and 360-degree skyline views.
detail:
A genuinely once-in-a-lifetime residence: one of just two quadruplex sky mansions at the top of the Porsche Design Tower, the brand's first tower in Asia. Spanning four private levels and approximately 1,135 m², the home is conceived as a vertical mansion in the sky — engineered, detailed and finished to the exacting design language Porsche is known for, high above the dense heart of central Bangkok.

Every principal space is wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass, opening onto uninterrupted 360-degree views across the city skyline and river beyond. Interconnected by a private internal lift and sculptural stair, the levels hold a sequence of grand entertaining and living volumes, six en-suite bedrooms, multiple kitchens for daily and formal use, and dedicated lounge, study and media spaces — all arranged for absolute privacy and flooded with natural light.

The crowning feature is a private heated sky pool set against the skyline, paired with expansive sun terraces for entertaining at altitude. Residents enjoy the tower's signature amenity: a patented automated car lift that delivers vehicles directly to the residence, alongside concierge, wellness and security services befitting one of the most exclusive addresses in the region.

features.l: One of only two quadruplex units
Four private levels in the sky
